Identification.LongTitle: An Act to amend the Income Tax Act (parenting tax credit)
Identification.RunningHead: An Act to amend the Income Tax Act (parenting tax credit)

Provision.Text: This enactment amends the Income Tax Act to establish a tax credit with respect to maternal and parental benefits.
Her Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:

Section.Text: This Act may be cited as the Supporting New Parents Act.
The Income Tax Act is amended by adding the following after section 118.07:
For the purpose of computing the tax payable under this Part for a taxation year by an individual, there may be deducted an amount determined by the formula

FormulaDefinition.Text: is the appropriate percentage for the taxation year; and

FormulaParagraph.Label: (a)
FormulaParagraph.Text: the amounts that an individual received in the taxation year as special benefits paid for any reason mentioned in paragraph 12(3)(a) or (b) or 152.14(1)(a) or (b) of the Employment Insurance Act; and

FormulaParagraph.Label: (b)
FormulaParagraph.Text: in the case of an individual who received in the taxation year benefits under the Act respecting parental insurance, R.S.Q., c. A-29.011, the amount that the individual would have received in the same taxation year under the provisions referred to in paragraph (a) if he or she had been entitled to those benefits.

Subsection.Text: In this section, an individual芒聙聶s unused parenting tax credit at the end of a taxation year is the amount determined by the formula

FormulaDefinition.Text: is the amount determined under this subsection in respect of the individual at the end of the preceding taxation year;
is the amount that may be deducted under section 118.08 in computing the individual芒聙聶s tax payable under this Part for the taxation year;

is the lesser of the value of B and the amount that would be the individual芒聙聶s tax payable under this Part for the year if no amount were deductible under this Division (other than an amount deductible under this section and any of sections 118 to 118.07, 118.3 and 118.7); and
is the amount that the individual may deduct under subsection (2) for the year.

Subsection.Text: For the purpose of computing an individual芒聙聶s tax payable under this Part for a taxation year, there may be deducted the lesser of

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: the amount determined under subsection (1) in respect of the individual at the end of the preceding taxation year, and

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: the amount that would be the individual芒聙聶s tax payable under this Part for the year if no amount were deductible under this Division (other than an amount deductible under this section and any of sections 118 to 118.07, 118.3 and 118.7).

Subsection.Text: For the purpose of determining the amount that may be deducted under subsection (2) in computing an individual芒聙聶s tax payable for a taxation year, in circumstances where the appropriate percentage for the taxation year is different from the appropriate percentage for the preceding taxation year, the individual芒聙聶s unused parenting tax credit at the end of the preceding taxation year is deemed to be the amount determined by the formula

FormulaDefinition.Text: is the appropriate percentage for the current taxation year;
is the appropriate percentage for the preceding taxation year; and
is the amount that would be the individual芒聙聶s unused parenting tax credit at the end of the preceding taxation year if this section were read without reference to this subsection.

Subsection.Text: The description of C in subsection 118.61(1) of the Act is replaced by the following:

FormulaDefinition.Text: is the lesser of the value of B and the amount that would be the individual芒聙聶s tax payable under this Part for the year if no amount were deductible under this Division (other than an amount deductible under this section and any of sections 118 to 118.09, 118.3 and 118.7);

Subsection.Text: Paragraph 118.61(2)(b) of the Act is replaced by the following:

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: the amount that would be the individual芒聙聶s tax payable under this Part for the year if no amount were deductible under this Division (other than an amount deductible under this section and any of sections 118 to 118.09, 118.3 and 118.7).

Subsection.Text: Paragraph (a) of the description of C in section 118.8 of the Act is replaced by the following:

Paragraph.Label: (a)
Paragraph.Text: the amount that would be the spouse芒聙聶s or common-law partner芒聙聶s tax payable under this Part for the year if no amount were deductible under this Division (other than an amount deductible under subsection 118(1) because of paragraph (c) of the description of B in that subsection, under subsection 118(10) or under any of sections 118.01 to 118.09, 118.3, 118.61 and 118.7)

Subsection.Text: Subparagraph (b)(ii) of the description of C in section 118.8 of the Act is replaced by the following:

Subparagraph.Label: (ii)
Subparagraph.Text: the amount that would be the spouse芒聙聶s or common-law partner芒聙聶s tax payable under this Part for the year if no amount were deductible under this Division (other than an amount deductible under any of sections 118 to 118.09, 118.3, 118.61 and 118.7).

Section.Text: Section 118.92 of the Act is replaced by the following:

In computing an individual芒聙聶s tax payable under this Part, the following provisions shall be applied in the following order: subsections 118(1) and (2), section 118.7, subsections 118(3) and (10) and sections 118.01, 118.02, 118.04, 118.041, 118.05, 118.06, 118.07, 118.3, 118.08, 118.09, 118.61, 118.5, 118.9, 118.8, 118.2, 118.1, 118.62 and 121.
Clause 128(2)(e)(iii)(A) of the Act is replaced by the following:
Sections 2 to 6 apply to the 2018 and subsequent taxation years.
